transcript.text:
[Where is she at?]
[A Familiar Voice?]
[He must be in a good mood]
[Reviewing/criticizing their fried chicken]
I can't watch this anymore
We will learn it the right way
And make you some fried chicken
I think I've made a mistake
[Yoo Jae Suk's original fried chicken]
[Park Myung Soo's seasoned fried chicken]
[They don't know that she's coming]
[Okay, everything is going well]
[Seconds before they meet Tzuyang]
Hello
[What is she doing here?]
Ms. Tzuyang

Did you order our chicken? Yes I did
[Tzudon Ramsay]
I've watched you eating our chicken
You were very hesitant as you were chewing No no no
Tbh, I'm not feeling it I'm not sure why
It was delicious But I've made a mistake
It was tasty, but I don't like ketchup
That's why
We're sorry No no no
Try today's fried chicken
It looks completely different from before
It just looks different
Can I start eating? Bon appetit
Get comfortable, it's okay
Go original first
The batter is much thinner now Jae Suk is good at this now

It's so good
Really?
Chew first
It's really good
I agree I tried it and it was tasty
It tastes like it's from an actual chicken place
It's really delicious
How did you make the batter this thin?
I learned it from a famous fried chicken owner
I'm still worried about mine
It has this distinct bitter taste
Marketing is more important than flavor
[Well..?]
Please be honest So that I can improve
It's completely different from before How so?
It has a kick to it

And this one also tastes like it's sold at restaurants
The previous one tasted as you made it from home
But this one has a market-like sauce flavor
It's much better right? Yes
All flavors suit each other, right?
It had like 5 different flavors before
[Self-criticism]
Can I be really honest?
Both are a bit strong on the seasoning
We're a bit strong, that's why
It's because we're not here for a long time
We're here to jab really strong and leave the market
Stop talking so that she can do her mukbang
ASMR
You're really pretty
Why don't you try out for Miss Korea instead?

Do you want to grab something to eat after?
Buy me
Why is he begging for food
Because I'm a fan!
Should the fan buy the food?
Tzuyu, oops Sorry Tzuyang
You called her Tzuyu last time
Why are you asking her to buy you food?
I apologize, but can I try it myself?
[Trying their own cooking]
It's tasty!
It would be better if it wasn't too salty, right?
Right, it's a bit salty
Tzuyang, it's delicious
Really good
Now I see why you said that It's salty

I like it, but a bit too salty
[Jae Suk's ASMR]
[I'm just eating]
Why are you drinking it from there? I'm doing what she's doing
I guess it looks more appetizing if it's poured it here
It's what makes her unique
What was your major?
Gaming Gaming?
Then did you first start as a gaming streamer?
No no, I didn't play games I made games
Game development
I see
Then why did you do mukbang all of a sudden?
I started it as a hobby
When did you find out you were good at eating?
Since I was young

Weren't you surprised by what you were capable of?
Well I just ate
When?
There's not a certain time frame I was just good at eating when I was little
Didn't your friends say anything?
Are you on your Radio Show?
Stop it, this isn't our style
This could be my last episode
Let me try the seasoned chicken
Try it
It wasn't bad Yes, try it
I'm not kidding
It's good, right?
It's good
It was better before (before she came here)
It's because it's been sitting here

No, it's not that
Then I will do better on the next episode
But if I put too much corn syrup, it makes the sauce too thick
That's better
But right now, the skin is like falling off with the sauce
Well, you should've came earlier
The other one was better Okay okay
This is like seasoned pollack
Seasoned pollack..?
The sauce is too wet It's like a seasoned pollack
The batter is falling apart
I like it like this
Your teeth will fall off if it's too hard
Really
But those taste amazing
Oh, you like that? Come to the basement

I'll knock your teeth out
Can I have some wet naps?
You come get it
How did manage to do this program without me?
You treat me like your slave
It's nice having you here
[Tzuyang just eating in the midst of all this]
Mine tastes much better, right?
[Nod nod]
It's because I went to Incheon to learn it He went to Samchungdong
Be quiet, she's doing ASMR
[Scratch scratch]
[Amazing level of concentration]
She likes the seasoned one Look at her eat
She's eating because she's a mukbanger
It was better before

[Oops, was that too loud?]
See? She's back to the original
She went Seasoned, Seasoned, Original
Why are you taking photos?
Do you like it?
[Don't zoom in~!]
You said you like it Do you not?
This one looks good
I'm currently eating the original fried chicken made by Mr. Jae Suk
And the spicy seasoned chicken made by Myung Soo
This one is very much like an oven-chicken
For improvement
I would like the seasoned chicken to have more consistency
The original is a bit salty
It'll be great if it was less salty
So in other words, in general, the..

Please be quiet
You need to make the sauce thicker
How many times are you going to tell me that?
I said I got it
Everything is falling apart
It has its pros and cons
It just tastes like a seasoned pollack
[Still arguing]
I'm sorry to do this on your mukbang
I tried it and it was good
Otherwise, it would be too hard to eat
You're not always right!
It was so much better before
It's definitely not a common "spicy seasoned chicken"
It's tasty nonetheless
Right? It's good

It's like braised pollack
Right? That's what I'm saying
It's like a fish dish
It's chicken
It's supposed to be sticky and thick
I like pollack too
But it's not pollack
Ms. Tzuyang, did you know this?
We watched your live stream last time, right?
The eating speed is different
I will make it less salty next time
She wants it more salty
No, less salty
Sticky sauce for me, right?
It's because a lot of people like to drink beer with fried chicken
And beer tastes good with salty foods

You're a coward
Sounds like an excuse
I apologize
I'm getting full just by watching you eat
That's a lie
If I want to beat Tzuyang, I need to eat 16 chickens?
[But first, let me eat]
[No, I don't eat that much]
Probably like 7 chickens
She says 7 chickens
I'm not good at eating chicken
Really?
Then what food are you best at?
Ramyun noodles
I had 30 servings of small beef intestines before
You need to worry about your own small intestines too

If you shove all of that in
Please be quiet bro
She needs to digest
What kind of comment is that?
I apologize on his behalf
It's okay
[Eating the last one]
That's really amazing
She makes it look so good
Can I post this on my social media?
Is that okay?
[Finishing it up with the drink]
[Mukbang finished]
You have your own closing comment, right?
Thanks everyone~
It was really yummy

Thanks for having us here
We'll close together by shouting this
Shout what?
Infinite!
[TMI: It's a slogan for the show "Infinite Challenge" that both Jae Suk and Myung Soo were cast in]
Thank you!
What was it again? Chicken Teacher Yoo?
Dr. Yoo [TMI: it sounds like the Korea phrase "I'm frying chicken"]
That's not that good Chicken & Myung Soo is better, right?
You're his fan, right!? That's why
I'm going to find my own Mukbanger that eats 7 chickens
Great job today
She really ate everything that was here
Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com
